channel.title: SQLite on Rithvik
channel.description: Recent content in SQLite on Rithvik

item.title: Seven URL Shortener
item.description: Introduction Flask is a framework for building web applications utilizing Python and SQLite with sqlalchemy is a database engine that can be used to store application data. Here, We wil be buliding a URL shortener, a service that takes any URL and generates a short URL, similar to tinyurl or bit.ly. We are going to generate random strings for the alias using python [library](random(https://docs.python.org/3/library/random.html). We will be using Flask, SQLite to build your URL shortener.
